sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and amt2 = 0 and amt4 = 0 and amt5 = 0

delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '3%' and (TTY = '100' or not GL like '%2') and not GL = '3584005' and not PC in ('141CPW0000','141SCP0000','141QUE0000','141SAB0000','141SBG0000')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,5) in ('19999','28999','28980','28989','19989')

update TransX set Flex5 = '200', Flex6 = 'interim/fh balances - needs further review' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and GL in ('1621502','2421502','2850500','2850998','2850996','4398014')
update TransX set Flex5 = '200', Flex6 = 'interim/fh balances - needs further review' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and substring(GL,1,5) in ('28510','35925')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL > '8000000' and Co = '2999'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (substring(GL,1,5) in ('11448','11449','11456','11457','11478','11455') or GL = '1145403') and Ledger = 'US'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL > '8000000' and Co in ('2998','2999')
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set PCdesc = p.Descr, Hierarchy = p.Hierarchy from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set TPname = p.Name from TransX t inner join TPs p on t.TP = p.TP where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex3 = '(2) Elim' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co in ('1999','2998','2999','3999')
update TransX set Flex3 = '(1) Co2Co' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex3 is NULL
update TransX set Flex2 = 'Co' + Co + ' Tp' + TP from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex1 = Descr, Flex4 = Field1 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on t.GL = m.ID where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'GL Grp 4'
update TransX set Flex1 = Descr, Flex4 = Field1 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on substring(t.GL,1,2) = m.ID where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'GL Grp 4'
update TransX set Amt1 = round(Amt2-Amt5,2), Amt3 = round(Amt2-Amt4,2) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Amt1 = 0, Amt3 = 0 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TTY in ('810','815')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and amt1 = 0 and amt2 = 0 and amt3 = 0
update TransX set Flex5 = 42 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('2998','2999') and Contract like 'DAH%'
update TransX set Flex5 = 8 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('2998','2999') and substring(Contract,1,2) = 'AH' and tp <> '2310'

update TransX set Flex5 = 1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and PC in ('220CSIC000','221CSIC000','341CSIC000') and Co in ('2001','2002','2003','2200','2999') and TP in ('2001','2002','2003','2200') and not (Contract like 'ORB QS%' or Contract like 'ORESA P%')
update TransX set Flex5 = 21 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2200' and TP = '2006' and Contract = 'TR910'
update TransX set Flex5 = 21 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2006' and TP = '2200' and Contract = '54'
update TransX set Flex5 = 21 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('2998','2999') and (Contract like 'CB CSIC%' or Contract like 'CB GIC%')
update TransX set Flex5 = 22 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2200' and TP = '2008' and Contract = 'R6'
update TransX set Flex5 = 22 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2008' and TP = '2200' and Contract = '32171'
update TransX set Flex5 = 22 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('2998','2999') and (Contract like 'CSIC SC%' or Contract like 'GIC SC%')
update TransX set Flex5 = 23 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2200' and TP = '2006' and Contract in ('TR911','BULK099')
update TransX set Flex5 = 23 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2006' and TP = '2200' and Contract = '58'
update TransX set Flex5 = 23 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('2998','2999') and (Contract like 'CB2 CSIC%' or Contract like 'CB2 GIC%')
update TransX set Flex5 = 3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2007' and TP = '3030'
update TransX set Flex5 = 3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '3030' and TP = '2007'
update TransX set Flex5 = 3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('2998','2999') and (Contract like 'LA SYND%' or PC = '1428190817')
update TransX set Flex5 = 5 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2001' and TP >= '3030' and TP <= '3075' and PC like '6%'
update TransX set Flex5 = 5 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co >= '3030' and Co <= '3075' and TP = '2001' and PC = '3991051101'
update TransX set Flex5 = 5 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '3030' and TP = '2001' and PC in ('3990000000','3991050801','5500000000','39910615HO')
update TransX set Flex5 = 5 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('2998','2999') and (Contract like 'FIRV LB%' or PC = '6413270317')
update TransX set Flex5 = 6 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2008' and TP >= '2300' and TP <= '2450' and PC like '6%'
update TransX set Flex5 = 6 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and ((Co >= '2300' and Co <= '2450') or Co = '2201') and TP = '2008' and Contract like 'FV-%'

update TransX set Flex5 = 6 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('2998','2999') and (substring(Contract,1,7) = 'FIRV ST' or substring(Contract,1,3) =  'FV-') and tp <> '2310'

update TransX set Flex5 = 6 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('2998','2999') and TP in ('2300','2400','2450','2008') and substring(PC,1,1) ='6' and not (substring(Contract,1,7) = 'FIRV ST' or substring(Contract,1,3) =  'FV-')

update TransX set Flex5 = 6 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('2998','2999') and PC = '6059000000' and not len(TP) = 4  and not (substring(Contract,1,7) = 'FIRV ST' or substring(Contract,1,3) =  'FV-') and tp <> '2310'
update TransX set Flex5 = 16 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2001' and TP = '3070' and PC = '34142503AF'
update TransX set Flex5 = 16 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '3070' and TP = '2001' and PC = '3992070001'
update TransX set Flex5 = 16 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('2998','2999') and Contract like 'N-LB AF%'
update TransX set Flex5 = 17 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2001' and TP = '3030' and Contract in ('29419','LN55832301')
update TransX set Flex5 = 17 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '3030' and TP = '2001' and PC = '3991030404'
update TransX set Flex5 = 17 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('2998','2999') and Contract like 'SYN2 LB%'

update TransX set Flex5 = 7 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2001' and TP >= '3070' and TP <= '3075' and PC in ('3410000000','3414250317','5500000000','34142503HO','34142906HO','3990000000')
update TransX set Flex5 = 7 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co >= '3070' and Co <= '3075' and TP = '2001' and PC in ('3990000000','3992070000','3992062002','5500000000')

update TransX set Flex5 = 7 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('2998','2999') and TP in ('2001','3070','3075') and PC in ('3410000000','3414250317','5500000000') and not (Contract like 'N-LB AF%' or Contract like 'HSC NCL%')

update TransX set Flex5 = (case when TP = '' then '777' else '7' end), Flex6 = 'NICL QS' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('2998','2999') and PC in ('3992070000','39990000EL','34142701EL') and not Contract like 'N-LB AF%'
update TransX set Flex5 = 10 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2007' and TP = '2300'
update TransX set Flex5 = 10 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co >= '2300' and Co <= '2400' and TP = '2007'
update TransX set Flex5 = 10 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('2998','2999') and (Contract like 'LA HIC%' or Contract in ('CBULK10','530','LA-PONT14'))
update TransX set Flex5 = 11 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2006' and TP = '2300' and PC = '4070200195'
update TransX set Flex5 = 11 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co >= '2300' and Co <= '2400' and TP = '2006' and PC = '4070200195'
update TransX set Flex5 = 11 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('2998','2999') and Contract like 'CAD HIC%'
update TransX set Flex5 = 9 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('3030','3070') and TP in ('2400','2450') and PC = '3991051101'
update TransX set Flex5 = 9 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co >= '2400' and Co <= '2450' and TP = '3030'
update TransX set Flex5 = 9 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co >= '2400' and Co <= '2450' and TP = '3070' and PC = '4050100182'
update TransX set Flex5 = 9 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('2998','2999')  and TP >= '2400' and TP <= '2450'and PC in ('3991051101','3992062102')
update TransX set Flex5 = 9 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('2998','2999') and TP in ('3030','3070') and not PC = '3991051101' and Contract like 'HSC SYN%'

update TransX set Flex5 = 12, Flex4 = 'z-Other', Flex1 = GL + ' ' + GLdesc from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('1000','1999','2008','4100') and Contract in ('67612W$13','67612W$16','67612W$18','67612W$19','67612W$20','67612W$21','67612*102')
update TransX set Flex5 = 13 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2001' and TP = '3030' and PC = '341SYND000' and not Contract in ('29419','LN55832301')

update TransX set Flex5 = 13 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '3030' and TP = '2001' and not PC in ('3991051101','3990000000','3991030404','3991061405') and not (BusCat >= '10' and BusCat <= '24')
update TransX set Flex5 = 13 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('2998','2999') and Contract like 'SYND LB%' and not PC in ('3991050801','5500000000','39910615HO')
update TransX set Flex5 = 14 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2002' and TP = '3030'
update TransX set Flex5 = 14 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '3030' and TP = '2002'
update TransX set Flex5 = 14 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('2998','2999') and Contract like 'SYND PB%'
update TransX set Flex5 = 15 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '3070' and TP = '2400' and PC = '3992062306'
update TransX set Flex5 = 15 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2400' and TP = '3070' and PC in ('3992062305','4050100247','5500000000')
update TransX set Flex5 = 15 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('2998','2999') and (Contract like 'HSC NCL%' or Contract like 'NL HSC%')
update TransX set Flex5 = 18 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2006' and TP = '2300' and not PC in ('4070200194','4070200195')
update TransX set Flex5 = 18 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2300' and TP = '2006' and not PC in ('4070200194','4070200195')
update TransX set Flex5 = 18 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('2998','2999') and Contract like 'CB HIC%'
update TransX set Flex5 = 20 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '4110' and TP = '2002'
update TransX set Flex5 = 20 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2002' and TP = '4110'
update TransX set Flex5 = 20 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('2998','2999') and Contract like 'ORESA P%'
update TransX set Flex5 = 24 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '3270' and TP = '3070'
update TransX set Flex5 = 24 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '3070' and TP = '3270'
update TransX set Flex5 = 24 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '3999' and Contract like 'QS%'
update TransX set Flex5 = 25 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2200' and TP = '4110'
update TransX set Flex5 = 25 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '4110' and TP = '2200'
update TransX set Flex5 = 25 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('2998','2999') and Contract like 'ORESA G%'
update TransX set Flex5 = 26 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2008' and TP = '3030' and Contract = '593'
update TransX set Flex5 = 26 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '3030' and TP = '2008' and PC = '3991061405' and BusCat = '20'
update TransX set Flex5 = 26 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('2998','2999') and Contract like 'ST SYND%'
update TransX set Flex5 = 27 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2300' and TP in ('3030','3070')
update TransX set Flex5 = 27 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('3030','3070') and TP = '2300'
update TransX set Flex5 = 27 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('2998','2999') and Contract like 'HIC NCL%'
update TransX set Flex5 = 28 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2008' and TP = '3030' and Contract = 'OACN16600'
update TransX set Flex5 = 28 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '3030' and TP = '2008' and PC = '3991061405' and not BusCat = '20'
update TransX set Flex5 = 28 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('2998','2999') and Contract like 'SYND ST%'
update TransX set Flex5 = 29 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2300' and TP = '2650'
update TransX set Flex5 = 29 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2650' and TP = '2300'
update TransX set Flex5 = 29 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('2998','2999') and Contract like 'PSI HIC%'
update TransX set Flex5 = 12, Flex4 = 'z-Other', Flex1 = GL + ' ' + GLdesc from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '1999' and TP = '1000'
update TransX set Flex5 = 30 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2001' and TP = '3030' and Contract in ('29783','LN55828501')
update TransX set Flex5 = 30 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '3030' and TP = '2001' and PC in ('3991061405')
update TransX set Flex5 = 30 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('2998','2999') and Contract like 'NLLBCYB%'
update TransX set Flex5 = 8 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2008' and TP >= '2300' and TP <= '2450' and not PC like '6%'
update TransX set Flex5 = 8 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co >= '2300' and Co <= '2450' and TP = '2008' and not Contract like 'FV-%'

update TransX set Flex5 = 8 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('2998','2999') and (TP = '2008' or (TP in ('2300','2400','2450') ) and tp <> '2310') and (PC in ('1002000000','5380000000','1000000000','1426720828') or PC like '140%' or PC like '4%') and not Contract in ('CSIC 2008','GIC 2008','HUD 2101','HUD 2102','2300-2101','CSIC SC 2200','CB HIC 2006','GIC SC 2200') and  not substring(Contract,1,7) in ('CSIC ST' ,'CAD HIC','GICD ST','ST SYND','PSI HIC','HCN CAD','ORESA S','HCN CAF') and not Contract like 'OPUS%'
update TransX set Flex5 = 8 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('2998','2999') and tp <> '2310' and upper(substring(Contract,1,5)) = 'HUD ST'
update TransX set Flex5 = 8 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('2998','2999') and tp <> '2310' and substring(PC,1,1) = '4' and Contract = 'PC RECLASS'
update TransX set Flex5 = 33 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2310' and TP = '2006'
update TransX set Flex5 = 33 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2006' and TP = '2310'
update TransX set Flex5 = 33 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2999' and Contract like 'HCN CAD%'
update TransX set Flex5 = 34 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2200' and TP = '2008' and not Contract = 'R6'
update TransX set Flex5 = 34 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2201' and TP = '2008' and not Contract like 'FV-%'
update TransX set Flex5 = 34 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2008' and TP in ('2200','2201') and not Contract in ('32171','FC0000293')

update TransX set Flex5 = 34 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('2998','2999') and TP in ('2008','2201') and (contract like 'CSIC ST%' or Contract like 'GIC ST%' or Contract like 'GICD ST%' or Contract = 'HUD 2101' or Contract = 'OPUS 2200')

update TransX set Flex5 = 34 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('2998','2999') and TP = '2200' and not Contract in ('220CSIC000','221CSIC000','341CSIC000','5500000000') and not (Contract like '16%' or Contract like 'CSIC SC%' or Contract like 'GIC SC%' or Contract like 'CB CSIC%' or Contract like 'CB GIC%' or Contract like 'ORESA G%')
update TransX set Flex5 = 35 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('2001','2002','2003') and TP = '2210' and Contract in ('AR506','AR507','AR508','610')
update TransX set Flex5 = 35 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2210' and TP in ('2001','2002','2003') and Contract >= 'BB100' and Contract <= 'BB103'
update TransX set Flex5 = 35 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('2998','2999') and TP in ('2001','2002','2003','2210') and Contract like 'ORB QS%'
update TransX set Flex5 = 38 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '4110' and TP = '2008' and Contract = 'OR5'
update TransX set Flex5 = 38 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2008' and TP = '4110'
update TransX set Flex5 = 38 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('2998','2999') and TP in ('2008','4110') and Contract like 'ORESA S%'
update TransX set Flex5 = 39 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2210' and TP = '2008' and Contract = 'BB105'
update TransX set Flex5 = 39 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2008' and TP = '2210' and Contract = '700'
update TransX set Flex5 = 39 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('2998','2999') and TP in ('2008','2210') and Contract like 'ORB ST%'
update TransX set Flex5 = 17 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2001' and TP = '3030' and PC = '3414300265' and not Contract in ('29419','LN55832301')

update TransX set Flex5 = 35 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('2001','2002','2003') and TP = '2210' and not Contract in ('AR506','AR507','AR508','610') and PC in ('220ORB0000','221ORB0000','341ORB0000')
update TransX set Flex5 = 30 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2001' and TP = '3030' and not Contract in ('29783','LN55828501') and PC = '3414300272'
update TransX set Flex5 = 38 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '4110' and TP = '2008' and not Contract in ('OR5','OR2')
update TransX set Flex5 = 21 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2006' and TP = '2200' and not Contract in ('54','58') and PC = '1600000100'
update TransX set Flex5 = 21 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2006' and TP = '2200' and not Contract in ('54','58') and PC = '1600000200'
update TransX set Flex5 = 23 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2200' and TP = '2006' and not Contract in ('TR910','TR911','BULK099') and PC = '1002000000'
update TransX set Flex5 = 24 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '3999' and TP in ('3070','3270')
update TransX set Flex5 = 40 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('2998','2999') and Contract like 'NGLBCYB%'
update TransX set Flex5 = 43 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('2998','2999') and Contract like 'SYN ST%'
update TransX set Flex5 = 35 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('2998','2999') and TP = '2210' and PC in ('220ORB0000','221ORB0000','341ORB0000')
update TransX set Flex5 = 44 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('2998','2999') and substring(contract,1,7) = 'HCN CAF'
update TransX set Flex5 = 33 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('2998','2999') and Contract like 'HCN CAD%'
update TransX set Flex6 = e.ShortName from TransX t inner join Eliminations e on t.Flex5 = e.ID where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex5 = 'RRP', Flex6 = 'RRP and CLRF reclasses' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is Null and Contract in ('RRP Reclass','CLRF')
update TransX set Flex6 = 'CRC Canada (old)' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 = '104'
update TransX set Flex5 = '101', Flex6 = '3210002 Add Paid-in Capital' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is Null and GL like '32100%'
update TransX set Flex5 = '102', Flex6 = '114xxxx & 344xxxx C/S' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is Null and substring(GL,1,3) in ('114','344')

update TransX set Flex5 = '4a', Flex6 = 'ORH Loan' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is Null and (Co in ('2998','2999') and GL = '1320000' and Contract = 'R/E') or Contract like '67612%' or GL in ('1290500','3584000','3584000')
update TransX set Flex5 = '4a', Flex6 = 'Real Estate' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is Null and Co = '2999' and ((GL = '1320000' and Contract = 'R/E') or Contract like '67612%')
update TransX set Flex5 = '7a', Flex6 = 'NICL QS' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and coalesce(Flex5,'') <> '7' and Co in ('2998','2999') and Contract like 'NICL LB%'
update TransX set Flex5 = '999', Flex6 = 'ORB QS' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is Null and Co in ('2002','2999') and TP = '2210' and (Contract = 'AR509' or PC = '2202FR0721')
update TransX set Flex5 = '39a', Flex6 = 'STM ORB' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is Null and Co = '2210' and TP = '4110' and Contract = 'BB104'
update TransX set Flex5 = '9a', Flex6 = 'HSC Synd' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is Null and Co in ('2999','3030') and TP = '2400' and PC = '3992062102'
update TransX set Flex5 = '112', Flex6 = 'cash accounts should not have TP' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '4398002' and Flex5 is NULL
update TransX set Flex5 = 'Sched F', Flex6 = 'Adj for Sched F' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is Null and Contract = 'SCHED F'

update TransX set Flex5 = '999', Flex6 = 'Proposed write-off' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is Null and Co in ('2998','2999') and (TP like 'F%' or TP = '2101' or Contract like 'HSC CAD%' or Contract in ('2300-2101','HUD 2102','ORB PB 2002','ORB PB 2210','HUD MISC'))
update TransX set Flex1 = '02 RCR & ALAE' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 in ('02 RCR','04 ALAE') and Flex5 = '8'
update TransX set Flex1 = '02 RCR & ALAE' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 in ('02 RCR','04 ALAE') and Flex5 = '8'
update TransX set Flex1 = '26 Chg RCR & ALAE' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 in ('26 Chg RCR','28 Chg ALAE') and Flex5 = '8'
update TransX set Flex3 = '(3) Commonwealth' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Contract like 'COW%' and Flex3 = '(1) Co2Co' and Flex5 = '8'
update TransX set Flex5 = '100', Flex6 = 'clearing ITD balance in current year' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt2 = 0 and Flex5 is NULL
update TransX set Flex5 = '111', Flex6 = 'no arrangement between 2002 and 2003' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and ((Co = '2002' and TP = '2003') or (Co = '2003' and TP = '2002')) and Flex5 is NULL
update TransX set Flex5 = '112', Flex6 = 'cash accounts should not have TP' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '10%' and Flex5 is NULL

update TransX set Flex5 = '114', Flex6 = 'co 2008 tp 3030 only for contracts 593 and OACN16600 - others should be written off' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2008' and TP = '3030' and Flex5 is NULL
update TransX set Flex5 = '115', Flex6 = 'co 2006 tp 2008 has no arrangement - should be written off' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2006' and TP = '2008' and Flex5 is NULL
update TransX set Flex5 = '116', Flex6 = 'co 2007 tp 2400/2450 only has Pontus - others should have TP removed' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2007' and TP in ('2400','2450') and Flex5 is NULL

update TransX set Flex5 = '117', Flex6 = 'co 2300/2400/2450 should not have TPs between themselves' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co in ('2300','2400','2450') and TP in ('2300','2400','2450') and Flex5 is NULL
update TransX set Flex5 = '118', Flex6 = 'co 3070/3075 tp 2001 undetermined balances' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co in ('3070','3075') and TP = '2001' and Flex5 is NULL

update TransX set Flex5 = '119', Flex6 = '1. change Tp to 2200 or 2. change contract to OR5 or 3. write-off' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '4110' and TP = '2008' and Contract = 'OR2' and Flex5 is NULL
update TransX set Flex5 = '120', Flex6 = 'TP should be 3070' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2300' and TP = '3030' and Flex5 is NULL
update TransX set Flex5 = '121', Flex6 = 'Fixed Assets between co 1000, 2005, 2008' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '1915007' and Flex5 is NULL

update TransX set Flex5 = '122', Flex6 = 'This contract should not have a TP, but it does, so we should stop IBNR from posting to this contract' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Contract = 'FC0000293' and Flex5 is NULL
update TransX set Flex5 = '123', Flex6 = 'UK Settle Direct - balance by TP?' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL in ('1935996','1935998','1938205') and Flex5 is NULL

update TransX set Flex5 = '125', Flex6 = 'e-mail sent to Neepa to clear the balance' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '3270' and TP = '2001' and GL in ('2319900','2319998','2399998','3590902') and Flex5 is NULL
update TransX set Flex5 = '126', Flex6 = 'old Elim 19 - need to clear balances' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2006' and TP = '2400' and Flex5 is NULL
update TransX set Flex5 = '127', Flex6 = 'need to reclass PC to 4070200195' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2006' and TP = '2300' and PC = '4070200194' and Flex5 is NULL
update TransX set Flex5 = '128', Flex6 = 'need to clear balances where 2002 cedes to 2008' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2002' and TP = '2008' and PC = '2202EU0721' and Flex5 is NULL
update TransX set Flex5 = '129', Flex6 = 'investigate source and clear - other assets FX' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL in ('3592202','4398001','3573002') and Flex5 is NULL
update TransX set Flex5 = '130', Flex6 = 'need to divide CTA between elim#s' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co in ('2998','2999') and GL like '359%' and Flex5 is NULL
update TransX set Flex5 = '134', Flex6 = 'Co 2998/2999 1320000' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co in ('2998','2999') and GL = '1320000' and Flex5 is NULL
update TransX set Flex5 = '135', Flex6 = 'Co 2998/2999 Equity & Building' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co in ('2998','2999') and (GL like '3%' or GL like '119%') and Flex5 is NULL

update TransX set Flex5 = '138', Flex6 = 'need to investigate small non-2998/2999 FX balances and clear' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Co in ('2998','2999') and Flex1 like '9%' and upper(substring(contract,1,7)) not in ('FV-EUCL','HCN CAF') and Flex5 is NULL
update TransX set Flex5 = '999', Flex6 = 'Proposed write-off' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is Null and Co in ('2998','2999') and TP = '2006' and Contract = 'UNKNOWN'
update TransX set Flex8 = (case when substring(GL,4,4) in ('9900','9901') and GL < '4000000' then 'reg/est' else 'other' end) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex7 = (case when Co in ('2998','2999') or Co = '3999' then 'Yes' else 'No' end) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update t set FSitemDesc = f.FSitemDesc from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL inner join Fsitems f on c.Fsitem = f.fsitem where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set BusCat = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'XX'
update TransX set Flex5 = 'zzz', Flex6 = 'unassigned' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 = 'zzz' and TP = 'F0001'
insert into TransX (KeyID,Flex5,Flex6) (select distinct KeyID,Flex5,Flex6 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')
update TransX set KeyID = '[batchID]-data2' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger is NULL

insert into TransX (KeyID,YearPeriod,FSitemDesc,GLdesc,Period,Date1,Flex1,Qtr,Date2,Flex2,Yr,Flex3) (select '[batchID]-data3',e.ID, e.ShortName, e.Def, max(p1.VerNbr), max(p1.Finished), substring(max(right('00'+convert(varchar,p1.VerNbr),2) + p1.RunBy),3,99), max(p2.VerNbr), max(p2.Finished), substring(max(right('00'+convert(varchar,p2.VerNbr),2) + p2.RunBy),3,99), max(coalesce(p4.VerNbr,0)), max(p3.Comments) from Eliminations e left join (select ID, VerNbr, Finished, RunBy, Comments from ProcessTracker where SubID = '[Yr][Mo]' and RunMode = 'Recon') p1 on p1.ID = e.ID left join (select ID, VerNbr, Finished, RunBy, Comments from ProcessTracker where SubID = '[Yr][Mo]' and RunMode = 'Elim' and len(ID) < 3) p2 on p2.ID = e.ID left join (select ID, VerNbr, Finished, RunBy, Comments from ProcessTracker where SubID = '[Yr][Mo]' and RunMode = 'Comments') p3 on p3.ID = e.ID left join (select ID, VerNbr, Finished, RunBy, Comments from ProcessTracker where SubID = '[Yr][Mo]' and RunMode = 'Elim' and Comments = 'y') p4 on p4.ID = e.ID where right('000'+convert(varchar,e.ID),3) < '050' group by e.ID, e.ShortName, e.Def)

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Ledger, Co, GL, TP, BusCat, Contract, PC, TTY, Amt2,Amt4,Amt5) values ('[batchID]','[Yr][Mo]',
